mechanics.excerpt: HISTORY THE WARRIORS Of KERENBKY The men and women who had followed Kerensky in order to preserve the ideals of the Star League had made planetfall on five worlds called the Pentagon Within two decades_ they had degenerated into vicious_ fratricidal conflict later known as the Exodus Civil War: Determined to salvage something from the wreckage of his father's dream, Kerensky $ son Nicholas led his Ioyal followers on second Exodus t0 safe haven, where together they forged the eugenics-based warrior society later known as the Clans Returning to the Pentagon worlds, the Clans conquered them and began preparing for the day they would return to the Inner Sphere and restore the Star League_ In 3005_ they sent unit of Clan Wolf warriors vanguard Wolf's Dragoons_ soon to become famed mercenary unit in the Inner Sphere_ The Dragoons fought for each of the Successor States in turn testing the strength of their militaries and sending intelligence back to the Clans.
